vocab.agent: Replit Agent builds full apps from descriptions. Describe the feature with input/output examples for best results.
vocab.stack: Defaults to Python (Flask/FastAPI) or Node.js. Specify your preferred language/framework explicitly.
vocab.database: Replit Database (key-value, built-in). PostgreSQL via the Database extension tab.
vocab.workflow: Agent writes → auto-runs in container → preview in browser tab → iterate with follow-up prompts.
vocab.deployment: Replit Deployments: Reserved VM (always-on) or Autoscale. Custom domain support with paid plan.
